completed: Extended AuthoritativeLiquidityContext with optional source-owned PortfolioCashflowProjection:v1 evidence.
Added CASHFLOW_PROJECTION to the bounded construction source-family vocabulary and LIQUIDITY_AWARE method requirements.
Updated liquidity supportability so source-owned projected total net cashflow can move LIQUIDITY_AWARE alternatives to PENDING_REVIEW when adjusted cash would breach policy.
Preserved truthful degraded behavior for stale, wrong-currency, no-projected-row, and source-degraded projection inputs.
Updated RFC work-to-be-done ledger, RFC-0039 source map, RFC-0039 gold assessment, README, repo context, and wiki source with implementation-backed wording.
explicit_non_claims: No client income-need profile, liability ladder, or wealth-planning forecast is claimed.
No manage-local cashflow forecast methodology was created.
No Gateway or Workbench product-surface support is claimed by this manage backend slice.

critical_review.design_assessment: The implementation reuses the existing construction authority-context pattern instead of adding a parallel liquidity model. Source-owned projection data is carried as evidence and only used for a bounded policy-pressure calculation.
code_quality_improvements: Nested projection model keeps source-product metadata, quality posture, and reason codes modular.
Shared post-trade cash-weight helper removes duplicated extraction logic in liquidity status and reason-code calculation.
Reason-code logic avoids reporting CASHFLOW_PROJECTION_READY when degraded projection flags are present.
remaining_boundaries: Income-need construction remains deferred until an owning source product publishes client need/liability semantics.
Front-office construction-lab realization remains downstream Gateway/Workbench work.
